Player Profile

ABOUT DEVIN

Position

Devin Medina is a dedicated and driven baseball player from Simi Valley, California. A left-handed first baseman and pitcher standing 6'0" and 190 lbs, Devin brings size, power, and versatility to the diamond. Since picking up a bat at age 5, he has developed into a two-way threat with a passion for competing at the highest level. Known for his work ethic, coachability, and relentless drive to improve, Devin brings energy and commitment to every practice and every game. He is looking to continue his baseball career at the collegiate level while pursuing a strong academic path.

Progression

THE JOURNEY

A documentary of growth, dedication, and milestones from day one to now.

2016
Where It All Started
Picked up a bat for the first time at age 5. Fell in love with the game playing tee-ball and never looked back. Even then, the competitive fire was obvious.
2018
First Travel Ball Season
Joined first competitive travel team. Began learning the fundamentals of real game situations — stealing bases, reading pitches, and playing under pressure.
2020
Leveling Up Through the Pandemic
When games stopped, the work didn't. Used the downtime to hit the cages daily and build strength. Came back stronger and more disciplined than ever.
2022
Middle School Dominance
Led the team in batting average and stolen bases. Named to the All-Star team and began attracting attention from competitive travel organizations.
2024
High School Varsity
Made the varsity roster as a sophomore. Competed against upperclassmen and held his own — earning starting position and respect from coaches and teammates.
2025
The Grind Continues
Currently working toward peak performance — refining mechanics, increasing exit velocity, and attending showcases to compete at the next level.
DEVIN MEDINA
